Video.summary: Hudson goes on his first date with his crush and Salish is controlling everything they do!
Video.title: Sister Controls Brother's First Date

Video.summary: Payton is invited to the Barbie movie premiere in Hollywood and attends an exclusive party.
Video.title: Hollywood Here

Video.summary: Payton debunks social media myths and then tours a farm where she gets to feed baby animals.
Video.title: Busting Viral Myths

Video.summary: Boys vs. Girls, Princess vs. Superheroes in an epic gymnastics challenge.
Video.title: Princess vs. Superhero

Video.summary: Who stole the baby’s gender reveal? Rebecca investigates!
Video.title: Gymnast Stole Reveal?

Video.summary: Bryton takes on a teenage dating challenge and goes on a blind date with 10 girls at once.
Video.title: 10 Dates at Once

Video.summary: Compilation of Jazzy's funniest TikToks.
Video.title: Jazzy's Funniest TikToks

Video.summary: The Fun Squad play Clue in real life. Can they solve the murder mystery?
Video.title: Surviving Clue IRL

Video.summary: Jazzy and Jack swap bodies for 24 hours. Will it strengthen their twin bond or trap them forever?
Video.title: Twin Body Swap

Video.summary: Jazzy, Jack and Kade go missing for 24 hours in a secret room.
Video.title: Twins Go Missing

Video.summary: Bryton tests cool and weird ninja gear from Amazon to find a gift for his siblings.
Video.title: I Tested Amazons Best Ninja Gear

Image.alt: I Tested Amazons Best Ninja Gear
I Tested Amazons Best Ninja Gear
I Tested Amazons Best Ninja Gear

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton attempt to get accepted for their first job.
Video.title: Twins First Job

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam react to their most embarrassing moments.
Video.title: Ninja Fam Embarrassing Moments

Video.summary: Jordan goes shopping to surprise Salish with 10 back-to-school gifts in one color, but she can only save one.
Video.title: One Color Gifts

Video.summary: Salish and Nadal claim to be dating. Are they really?
Video.title: Are They Dating?

Video.summary: Salish skips school, but Jordan is secretly following her!
Video.title: Salish Skipping School

Video.summary: Salish stays home alone overnight, but her dad watches her from security cameras.
Video.title: Home Alone With Security Cameras

Video.summary: Can Salish pick her dad out of a group of nine costumed "dads"?
Video.title: Guess The Dad

Video.summary: Salish must prove she's ready for high school in a series of extreme challenges.
Video.title: Salish First Day of High School

Image.alt: Salish First Day of High School
Salish First Day of High School
Salish First Day of High School

Video.summary: Salish and Ferran buy everything in one color, but if they go over budget, they lose it all!
Video.title: Buying Everything in One Color

Video.summary: Salish controls her dad using every emotion from Inside Out 2.
Video.title: Survive Every Emotion From Inside Out

Image.alt: Survive Every Emotion From Inside Out
Survive Every Emotion From Inside Out
Survive Every Emotion From Inside Out

Video.summary: Jazzy swap bodies with the Grinch and pranks her siblings.
Video.title: Grinch Body Swap

Video.summary: Kade blind dates 6 girls based only on their outfit.
Video.title: Dress to Impress Challenge

Video.summary: Jazzy & Shae vs. Jack & Wyett: 50 spooky pools, one mysterious chest. Can they find the key in time?
Video.title: Surviving 50 Mystery Pools

Video.summary: Jazzy‘s best friend Shae tests her to see if she’s ready for her first day of high school.
Video.title: Daughter’s 1st Day of High School

Video.summary: Payton explores America's largest mall, and can’t help but tell the truth after a dentist visit.
Video.title: Fun Park

Video.summary: Payton and her best friend, Jazzy, play a guessing game with mystery designer bags.
Video.title: In the Bag

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton celebrate their 13th birthday party with surprises, fun, and family.
Video.title: Twin Birthday Surprise

Video.summary: Payton takes a gondola to the top of a Utah Mountain where the Ninja Family dines in the sun.
Video.title: Treat at Mountain Top

Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt find a secret room in their new house and reveal it with a mystery YouTube family.
Video.title: We Found a Secret Room

Video.summary: Rebecca investigates who stole Zadie’s American Girl doll before disaster strikes.
Video.title: Who Stole Her American Girl? Game of Clue

Image.alt: Who Stole Her American Girl? Game of Clue
Who Stole Her American Girl? Game of Clue
Who Stole Her American Girl? Game of Clue

Video.summary: Rebecca faces zombies and cheerleaders in a real-life dress to impress challenge.
Video.title: Cheerleaders vs. Zombies

Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt reveal a big sweet surprise to Zadie.
Video.title: Surprising Our Baby!

Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt try to stop Zadie from sneaking out of the new house at midnight with a friend.
Video.title: Zadie Sneaks Out at Midnight

Video.summary: Rebecca and friends tour YouTuber homes while trying to avoid a brutal babysitting penalty.
Video.title: Millionaire Houses Challenge

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz flee when the family turns green, then it's into the ring with WWE star Ricochet.
Video.title: Smash Bash

Video.summary: Rita partners with the Ninja Kidz to save the Earth from Goldar and Lord Zedd.
Video.title: Ranger Danger

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam travel to Las Vegas to open a new Ninja Kidz Action Park location.
Video.title: We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ

We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ
We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz must buy everything in one color without going over the budget.
Video.title: One Color Shopping Challenge

Video.summary: Bryton busts 100 myths in 24 hours.
Video.title: Busting 100 Myths

Video.summary: Mom tries to pick Jazzy a crush for Valentine's day.
Video.title: Jazzy Picks A Crush

Video.summary: Jack and Jazzy move out for 24 hours. Can they survive on their own?
Video.title: Twins Move Out

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz in an insane challenge of skills, strength and crazy dares.
Video.title: I Dare You

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz must stay inside the circle and Payton goes head to head with WWE wrestlers.
Video.title: The Circle Challenge
